# 14 — Learning Path Engine

<context-hint>
Use after MVP core if learning paths need scaffold or implementation.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as Architect + Backend + Learner/Admin UI as needed. Implement or scaffold Learning Path Engine with real contracts.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `docs/spec/index.md`, `docs/spec/digests/learner_ui_digest.md`, `docs/spec/compact/06_learner_ui_modules.md`, `docs/spec/compact/02_database_prisma.md`, and `docs/spec/compact/03_backend_api_registry.md`.
2. Inspect curriculum schema/routes/UI.
3. Implement one vertical slice:
   - path catalog
   - path detail
   - admin builder shell
   - enrollment/progress
   - competency tracking
4. Use feature flags if incomplete.
5. No fake completion/progress.
</instructions>
